Hero.description: Beautifully designed components that you can copy and paste into your apps. Accessible. Customizable. Open Source.

Features.description: We rethought the component library from the ground up. Here is what makes ShadcnUIKit different.

design.title: The Design System
design.description: A complete, composable architecture for your product. Global tokens, unified colors, and consistent spacing.

typeSafe.title: Type Safe
typeSafe.description: Built with TypeScript for a superior developer experience. Autocomplete, validation, and zero runtime errors.

responsive.title: Responsive
responsive.description: Mobile-first architecture ensuring your app looks perfect on phones, tablets, and desktops automatically.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Optimized for speed with zero-runtime overhead. Components compile to standard React & CSS.

InteractivePreview.headerDescription: A fully functional, responsive dashboard layout demonstrating the power of our components.

Footer.description: Beautifully designed components built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS. Open source and free to use in your applications.

main.title: Documentation
main.subtitle: Welcome to the comprehensive documentation for ShadcnUIKit. Here you will find detailed guides, component APIs, and practical examples to help you build better applications faster.
main.installationDesc: Get up and running in minutes.
main.themingDesc: Customize every aspect of your app.
main.openSource: Our library is designed to be copy-pasted into your project. We don't believe in locking you into a specific dependency. You own the code. You can customize it, extend it, and make it your own.

button.title: Button Component
button.desc: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

hook.title: useToast Hook
hook.desc: A powerful hook to manage toast notifications.

theme.title: Theming
theme.desc: Use CSS variables for robust theming capabilities.

ComponentsPage.title: Components
ComponentsPage.subtitle: Beautifully designed, accessible components. Copy and paste into your apps.

Themes.title: Theme Customizer
Themes.subtitle: Customize your UI experience. Pick a style and color for your components.

Showcase.title: Built with
Showcase.subtitle: Discover the incredible applications developers are building. From enterprise dashboards to creative portfolios.

Pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your project. All plans include access to our core components.

Blog.title: Blog
Blog.subtitle: Updates, tutorials, and insights from the team.

1.title: Introducing ShadcnUIKit V2
1.desc: We've rebuilt the entire library from the ground up. Better performance, more accessibility, and a brand new design system.

2.title: Building Accessible Forms
2.desc: A deep dive into creating forms that work for everyone. Learn about ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, and error handling.

3.title: The Future of React Server Components
3.desc: How server components are changing the way we build web applications. What you need to know for 2024.

Templates.title: Templates
Templates.subtitle: Production-ready templates to jumpstart your next project. Clone and customize.
